LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE OF A CO-WORKERS STATEMENT TO HIM ABOUT STATEMENTS MADE BY ANOTHER TO THE CO-WORKERS ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF HAS NO ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT'S LEGITIMATE REASON FOR THE ACTIONS TAKEN ALL A PRETEXT FOR DISCRIMINATION. MR. HARRIS IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-25-2011 - SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED FOR DEFENDANT. NOT REPORTED (D606).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAM, THANG LE TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEFENDANT TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
